rules:
Each player turns all of his or her Prize cards face up. (Those Prize cards remain face up for the rest of the game.)

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Harmonize
attacks.effect: From the moment you use this attack, you must begin to sing a song. (While the song is being sung, the game continues.) When the song is finished, this attack does 30 damage.

rules: (This card cannot be used at official tournaments.)

flavorText: One summer, a group of Pikachu was found riding the waves at the local beach.

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: By learning how to fly, Pikachu overcame its weakness to Fighting Pokémon.

attacks.name: ふみつけ[Stomp]
attacks.effect: コインを1回投げオモテなら、10ダメージを追加。 Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: Dr.オーヤマ考案「日米交流カード」パーティ気分で和洋せっちゅう。

rules:
Discard a card from your hand. If you do, look at the top 8 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Shuffle 6 in any combination of Pokémon and basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.effect: You may have your opponent switch his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Mirror Move
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does the same amount of damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Feather Lance
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Shuffle 2 cards from your hand into your deck. (If you can't shuffle 2 cards into your deck, you can't play this card.) Then, draw a card.

attacks.name: Conversion 3
attacks.effect: Choose Grass, Fire, Water, Lightning, Psychic, Fighting, Darkness, Metal, Fairy, or Dragon type. The Defending Pokémon's Weakness is now that type until the end of your next turn. (The amount of Weakness doesn't change.)

flavorText: Using the most advanced technologies, scientists finally succeeded in making the first artificial Pokémon.

attacks.name: Scrunch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 80 damage to itself.

flavorText: It lays several eggs a day. The eggs are apparently rich in nutrients and extremely delicious.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: A two-headed Pokémon that was discovered as a sudden mutation. It runs at a pace of over 60 miles per hour.

attacks.name: Leek Slap
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't use Leek Slap during your next turn.

flavorText: It always walks about with a plant stalk clamped in its beak. The stalk is used for building its nest.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shadowy Bite
attacks.effect: This attack does 60 damage times the number of Special Energy cards in your opponent's discard pile.

flavorText: Its rear feet have three toes each. They are webbed, enabling it to swim across rivers.
Its fangs are long and very sharp. They grow continuously, so it gnaws on hard things to whittle them down.

attacks.name: Mach Cyclone
attacks.effect: You may have your opponent switch his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Metronome
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

flavorText: Its adorable appearance makes it popular as a pet. However, it is rare and difficult to find.
The spirit of a pro boxer has infused this Pokémon. It throws punches that are faster than a bullet train.

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon would be damaged by an attack, prevent that attack's damage done to this Pokémon if that damage is 60 or less.

flavorText: It usually lives underground. It searches for food while boring its way through the ground at 50 miles per hour.

attacks.name: Boomerang Lariat
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's attacks do 100 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Machamp BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

flavorText: Its four ruggedly developed arms can launch a flurry of 1,000 punches in just two seconds.

attacks.name: Karate Chop
attacks.effect: This attack does 60 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Submission
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: Its formidable body never gets tired. It helps people by doing work such as the moving of heavy goods.

attacks.name: Dual Chop
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Its whole body is composed of muscles. Even though it's the size of a human child, it can hurl 100 grown-ups.

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: In battle, it digs through the ground and strikes the unsuspecting foe from an unexpected direction.

attacks.name: Dig Through
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It burrows through the ground at a shallow depth. It leaves raised earth in its wake, making it easy to spot.

attacks.name: Sand Attack
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

flavorText: It burrows and lives underground. If threatened, it curls itself up into a ball for protection.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

attacks.name: Energy Absorption
attacks.effect: Attach an Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Regeneration
attacks.effect: Heal 60 damage from this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Barrier
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon. If 1 of your Pokémon used Barrier during your last turn, this attack can't be used.

flavorText: A Pokémon whose genetic code was repeatedly recombined for research. It turned vicious as a result.

attacks.name: Foul Gas
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. If tails, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: Its thin, balloon-like body is inflated by horribly toxic gases. It reeks when it is nearby.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: A descendant of the legendary animal baku, which is said to eat dreams. It is skilled at hypnotism.

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Dream Eater
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is not Asleep, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: If you get the feeling of being watched in darkness when nobody is around, Haunter is there.

attacks.name: Little Grudge
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack, discard an Energy attached to the Attacking Pokémon.

attacks.name: Nightmare
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: A being that exists as a thin gas. It can topple an Indian elephant by enveloping the prey in two seconds.

attacks.name: Toxic Drill
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 2 damage counters instead of 1 on that Pokémon between turns.

rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Nidoking BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

attacks.name: Rumble
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Tail Swing
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It is recognized by its rock-hard hide and its extended horn. Be careful with the horn as it contains venom.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It is easily angered. By swinging its well-developed horn wildly, it can even punch through diamond.

attacks.name: Double Stab
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Its large ears are flapped like wings when it is listening to distant sounds. It extends toxic barbs when angered.

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: One of the legendary bird Pokémon. While it is flying, it makes crackling and snapping sounds.

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Thunder Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It loves to feed on strong electricity. It occasionally appears around large power plants and so on.
It explodes in response to even minor stimuli. It is feared, with the nickname of "The Bomb Ball."

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: A life-form whose identity is unknown. It is said to Screech or suddenly Self-Destruct.

attacks.name: Thunder Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Self-Destruct
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 80 damage to itself.

flavorText: A linked cluster formed of several Magnemite. It discharges powerful magnetic waves at high voltage.

attacks.name: Thunder Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Self-Destruct
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 50 damage to itself.

flavorText: It moves while constantly hovering. It discharges Thunder Wave and so on from the units at its sides.

attacks.name: Spark Bolt
attacks.effect: You may discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavorText: Its electric charges can reach even 100,000 volts. Careless contact can cause even an Indian elephant to faint.

attacks.name: Thunder Jolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It has small electric sacs on both its cheeks. If threatened, it looses electric charges from the sacs.

attacks.name: Bubble Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Dragon Rage
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It has an extremely aggressive nature. The Hyper Beam it shoots from its mouth totally incinerates all targets.

attacks.name: Flail

flavorText: It is virtually worthless in terms of both power and speed. It is the most weak and pathetic Pokémon in the world.

attacks.name: Star Freeze
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: This Pokémon has a geometric body. Because of its body, the locals suspect that it is an alien creature.

attacks.name: Quick Blow
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: It appears in large numbers by seashores. At night, its central core flashes with a red light.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: Its body is covered with a pure white fur. The colder the weather, the more active it becomes.

flavorText: Covered with light blue fur, its hide is thick and tough. It is active in bitter cold of -40 degrees Fahrenheit.
